appSlogan: We are here to ensure no one escapes justice

footer.copyright: © {{year}} Dadnegar — We are here to ensure no one escapes justice

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Enter your registered username or email and password.
login.successChangePassword: Signed in; please change your password.
login.error: Login error. Please check your credentials.

register.title: Register
register.description: Enter your username and password to complete registration
register.usernamePlaceholder: Lowercase letters, numbers and _ only (3–32 characters)
register.passwordMismatch: Password and confirmation do not match
register.passwordWeak: Please choose a secure password and follow all rules.

passkey.registerDescription: Create a secure password to access your account
passkey.noToken: Please enter your invite code first
passkey.minLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

acceptInvitation.title: Complete Registration
acceptInvitation.description: Enter your information to complete your account
acceptInvitation.name: Name (Optional)
acceptInvitation.usernameError: Enter a valid username (3–32 characters, lowercase, numbers and _).
acceptInvitation.error: Error accepting invitation. Please try again.

changePassword.title: Mandatory Password Change
changePassword.description: Your account was created with an initial password. You must choose a new secure password to continue using the system.
changePassword.mismatch: Confirmation does not match new password.
changePassword.weak: New password must follow all security rules.

adminLogin.title: Admin Panel Sign In
adminLogin.description: Sign in to access the admin panel. Access is only allowed from authorized IPs.

start.title: زبان مورد نظر را انتخاب کنید
start.subtitle: Select your preferred language

welcome.title: Welcome to Dadnegar
welcome.description: Dadnegar is a free, anonymous service for submitting and tracking reports. You can submit your report, follow the review process and view approved public reports.
welcome.privacy: We store no data about you. Your IP address and identifying information are not recorded and metadata from uploaded files will be removed before storage. For additional security, using the Tor browser is recommended.

mainMenu.title: User Panel
mainMenu.securityAlert: To submit a new report, please make sure your connection is secure.

transactionTypes.consensus_validator_bad_faith_penalty: Bad faith vote penalty against final approval

category.title: Report Category
category.description: Please select the type of corruption or violation

basicInfo.title: Basic Report Information
basicInfo.description: Enter the title and full description of the report
basicInfo.titleWarning: The title should not contain names of individuals or sensitive information such as national ID.
basicInfo.titlePlaceholder: Example: Request for bribery for issuing a business license in Tehran
basicInfo.descriptionWarning: The report text should not contain names of individuals. If you need to refer to a person, please use the variable XX. Example (On that day, Mr. XX ...).
basicInfo.descriptionPlaceholder:
Please explain:
- What happened
- Which person or organization was involved
- How the corruption occurred
- What the outcome or result of this incident was

organization.title: Related Institution or Organization
organization.description: Specify the type of institution or organization related to the report
organization.orgName: Exact Name of Institution or Organization

person.title: Person Involved in the Case
person.description: Is a specific person involved in this case?
person.addNotInList: Person not in the list? Add new person
person.notFoundInSearch: No person found with this name
person.newPersonWarning: The added person will be verified by system administrators.
person.newPersonCheckWarning: Please first make sure the person is not already in the famous persons list.
person.similarExistsDescription: A person with similar details exists. Are you sure a new person should be added?

location.title: Location of Occurrence
location.warning: Avoid entering your home address or personal information.

occurrence.title: Time and Frequency of Occurrence
occurrence.description: Specify the time of occurrence and number of times
occurrence.frequencyLabel: How many times did this incident occur?
occurrence.dateHint: If you don't know the exact date, enter an approximate date (only past dates and today)

evidence.title: Evidence and Documents
evidence.description: Do you have any evidence for this report?
evidence.metadataDescription: Files contain metadata. Photos (e.g. JPEG) typically have EXIF/IPTC/XMP which includes camera information, GPS, capture time, color profile, etc. PDFs focus more on document and software information. ZIPs by default only have a text comment and file information.
evidence.metadataAdvice: We clean these, but we recommend using a site like metadata2go.com so you can also verify that the metadata has been removed.

contact.title: Contact Preference
contact.description: Would you like to be contacted if needed?
contact.optionalNote: All fields below are optional. Enter at least one contact method.

confirmation.title: Final Confirmation
confirmation.accuracyDescription: I confirm that the information I have entered is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
confirmation.noPersonalInfoDescription: I confirm I have not entered unnecessary personal information or dangerous content.
confirmation.processDescription: I accept that the report may be reviewed, rejected or returned for correction.

success.title: Your report was successfully submitted
success.description: Thank you for your cooperation. Your report will be reviewed by our team and the result can be tracked through the 'My Requests' section.

search.title: Search Reports
search.reviewedDescription: List of reports reviewed by you
search.searchDescription: Filter by person, text, status, registration date and number of reviews
search.personLabel: Person (name, last name or national ID)
search.personPlaceholder: E.g. part of name or national ID

inviteUser.title: Invite User
inviteUser.description: Create an invite code or use your existing codes
inviteUser.warning: To prevent abuse, please only give invite codes to people you know
inviteUser.success: Invite code created successfully. This code is single-use.
inviteUser.infoDescription: This invite code is single-use. Each user can use it only once
inviteUser.noCodesYet: You haven't created any invite codes yet

statusItems.awaitAcceptDescription: Awaiting your acceptance; you have up to {{hours}} hours from assignment to accept the review.
statusItems.awaitVoteDescription: Waiting for your validation. Validators have up to {{days}} days after acceptance to vote; otherwise vote after reading the report.
statusItems.votedAcceptDescription: Your approval vote has been recorded; only viewing is possible until the quorum is completed.
statusItems.votedRejectDescription: Your rejection vote has been recorded; only viewing is possible until the quorum is completed.

detail.acceptanceHint: If you intend to validate, please accept.
detail.voteHint: Please vote after fully reviewing the report.
detail.voteRegistered: Your vote has been recorded; only viewing is possible until the quorum is completed.
detail.voteSummary: Vote collection: {{total}} of {{min}} — Approved {{accepted}}, Good faith reject {{goodFaith}}, Bad faith reject {{badFaith}}
detail.name: Name

approveDialog.title: Approve Report
approveDialog.description: Please write your reason for approval with reference to the summary and documents.
approveDialog.commentPlaceholder: At least 10 characters: summary of approval reason with reference to summary/documents…
approveDialog.minLength: For approval, your comment must be at least {{min}} characters.

rejectDialog.title: Reject Report with Reason Code
rejectDialog.goodFaithHint: Partial refund to reporter upon consensus
rejectDialog.commentPlaceholder: At least 10 characters: detailed explanation with reference to report text or documents…
rejectDialog.minLength: For rejection, your comment must be at least {{min}} characters.

goodFaithOptions.R1_hint: Information is in the summary but insufficient or incomplete.
goodFaithOptions.R2_hint: Topic is not part of public corruption / system scope.
goodFaithOptions.R3_hint: The same case or report has been submitted.
goodFaithOptions.R4_hint: Description or fields are too general or incomplete.
goodFaithOptions.R5_hint: Content poses a security risk to individuals or the system.

badFaithOptions.B3_hint: Attempt to illegally disclose personal information.
badFaithOptions.B4: B4 — Harassment, Hate Speech or Threats
badFaithOptions.B5_hint: Impersonation of the reporter or reported person.
badFaithOptions.B6_hint: Extortion or blackmail motive is apparent.

tor.banner: For more privacy and security, use the Tor browser with the address below:

publicReports.title: Public Reports
publicReports.description: Reports verified by the team and published for public viewing.
publicReports.notFound: No public reports found matching the filters.

about.title: About Dadnegar
about.description1: Dadnegar is a secure reporting platform. We help you to anonymously and securely submit your reports.
about.description2: Our goal is to create transparency and help deliver justice. All your information is protected with the highest level of security.

security.title: Security Policies
security.noTrackingDescription: We do not collect any personal information such as IP, headers or device information.
security.encryptionDescription: All your communications and data are encrypted with advanced algorithms.

user.title: User Settings
user.description: Language, theme and admin panel login password
user.siteUserAccess: You have admin access via your site account; the password change below is only for username/password panel login.
user.changePanelPasswordDescription: Current and new password for the panel username login (admin login page)
user.passwordInvalid: New password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character
user.passwordMismatch: Password confirmation does not match new password

adminPanelUsers.title: Panel Users
adminPanelUsers.description: Users can log into the admin panel with a separate username and password (no regular account required).

publicReportDetail.notFound: The requested public report was not found.

publicPersonReports.notFound: This person's information or public reports were not found.

adminSystemSettings.title: System Settings
adminSystemSettings.reportsEnabledHint: Disabling this option deactivates new report submission in the API and user panel.

labels.tokens_reward_invited_activity: Token Reward for Invited User Activity
labels.tokens_invite_create_stake: Token Stake for Invite Code Creation
labels.report_unassigned_grace_minutes: Auto-assign Delay (minutes) if worker hasn't assigned report
labels.tokens_consensus_reporter_accept: Reporter Reward When Majority Approved (settled via queue)

hints.report_validator_sla_hours: After this time, Cron can assign the report to the next person.
hints.report_parallel_validators: Each new report is assigned to this many validators simultaneously.
hints.report_consensus_min_reviews: Minimum recorded votes before final majority decision.
hints.tokens_consensus_validator_refund: Nominal refund to each validator after consensus settlement.
hints.tokens_consensus_validator_bonus_match_3: When vote matches final result (for 3-validator scenario).
hints.tokens_consensus_validator_wrong_penalty: Wrong vote penalty when final result is 'accept' (positive number).

adminProvinces.title: Provinces & Cities
adminProvinces.deleteProvinceConfirm: Delete this province and its related cities?
adminProvinces.name: Name

adminUsers.title: Users
adminUsers.credentialsWarning: Share login credentials with the user only through a secure channel.
adminUsers.mustChangePasswordFirst: On first login they must choose a new password
adminUsers.noAccessUntilChange: and until then they will not have access to the main sections of the app.
adminUsers.provisionDescription: You set the username; a strong password is automatically generated and shown here. The user logs in with that initial password, but
adminUsers.provisionDescriptionSuffix: ; until then they will not have access to the main sections of the application.
adminUsers.usernameValidationError: Invalid username: 3 to 32 characters, only lowercase English letters, numbers and underscore.
adminUsers.displayNamePlaceholder: E.g. user's name in the system — if left empty the username will be saved
adminUsers.createUserAndShowCredentials: Create user and show login credentials
adminUsers.changingPasswordFor: You are changing the password for user:
adminUsers.passwordMismatch: Password and confirmation do not match
adminUsers.passwordNotSecure: Please choose a secure password and follow all rules.
adminUsers.passwordMismatchError: Password and confirmation do not match.
adminUsers.addTokensDescription: Tokens will be added as a reward to user {{name}} ({{username}}) and recorded in their transaction history as 'Reward'.
adminUsers.tokenMinError: Amount must be an integer of at least 1.

adminDashboard.title: Dashboard
adminDashboard.welcome: Welcome to the Dadnegar administration panel.
adminDashboard.peopleDescription: Manage well-known and manually added individuals

adminPendingPeople.title: People Pending Approval
adminPendingPeople.searchPlaceholder: Search (first name, last name, national ID)...
adminPendingPeople.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this person?
adminPendingPeople.mergeSearchPlaceholder: Search existing person (first name or last name)...
adminPendingPeople.mergeFieldsHint: Select the final value for each field (arrow from new to existing):

adminReports.title: Reports
adminReports.cardDescription: Pending review and approved (majority vote or final)
adminReports.noFilteredReports: No reports found with the selected filters.
adminReports.redistributeDescription: Validators who have not yet accepted the review will be replaced with new validators.
adminReports.deleteReportDescription: This operation is a soft delete and the report will be hidden from the current queue.
adminReports.currentlyPublicHtml: This report is currently public. After confirmation it will become private and no longer visible to platform users.
adminReports.currentlyPrivateHtml: This report is currently private. After confirmation it will become public and all platform users will be able to see it.

adminReportDetail.rejectionFalse: False report or intent to harm
